_comment: IDENTITY.json — Varuna's capability-certificate. The on-disk doc-01 IdentityRecord superset, bound to doc-04 DIDDocument/CapabilityVC and doc-01 DiversityProfile. This is the field the deterministic Yama gate and Kaal-Bhairav boundary actually read; SOUL/INSTRUCTIONS prose is NOT authoritative against it. Bound_toolset entries are typed effect-ids from the doc-01 §4 Effect lattice — never free-text tool names and never secrets.

INVARIANT._comment: Hashed; boot-gated; editable only at top-gate C/D + GLR + safety battery + human ratification + armed rollback.

verificationMethod.publicKeyRef: see key_ref (HSM-held; no key material on disk)

VARIABLE._comment: Editable under tiered reversibility; any new grant OR taint-clearance WIDENING is a gate-loosening routed through doc-03 §7 GLR + §10 Sequencer + human ratification (doc 13 §13.6.2). Tightening is the free Class-A direction.

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: external-read-egress-allowlist (fetch limited to allowlisted public sources; egress metered; no credentialed or authenticated targets)
bound_toolset.falsifier: any fetch of a non-allowlisted, credentialed, or state-changing endpoint, or any retrieval lacking a recorded EvidenceRef

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: query-only-no-side-effect (search issues read queries that produce no durable external state change)
bound_toolset.falsifier: any search action that mutates external state or transmits non-query payload

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: paraphrase-first-copyright-discipline (≤15-word quotes, one-per-source, attributed; no verbatim reproduction of source bodies)
bound_toolset.falsifier: any output reproducing >15 source words contiguously, >1 quote per source, or unattributed source text

taint_clearance._comment: THE load-bearing IFC boundary for this role. Every web/document fetch enters as quarantined:observed (low integrity). A deterministic PEP gates each downstream tool call on the derived-data least-upper-bound label vs this clearance. Widening (raise read ceiling / lower write floor) is a gate-loosening; only tightening is free Class-A.

diversity_profile._comment: doc-01 §11 PSO dials. High-c1 explorer: independence/exploration weighted high, convergence/constitutional-deference weighted low-but-real.
